tasks.title: Add required column to submittal_workflow_steps
tasks.description: Add a migration to create the required boolean column (NOT NULL DEFAULT false) on submittal_workflow_steps so the API-accepted field is actually persisted.

tasks.title: Pass submittal_id in submittal_responses INSERT
tasks.description: Fix the workflow-steps POST handler to include submittal_id in the submittal_responses insert payload, matching the non-nullable column requirement.

tasks.title: Fix responsible_contractor_id type mismatch
tasks.description: Change responsible_contractor_id from integer to UUID in the submittals table and add a proper FK constraint to companies.id.

tasks.title: Standardize ball_in_court on UUID with user dropdown
tasks.description: Standardize ball_in_court to store user UUIDs consistently. Replace the free-text Input with a user select dropdown in the form.

tasks.title: Resolve status CHECK constraint vs API value conflict
tasks.description: Verify live DB CHECK constraint on submittal status. Drop old lowercase constraint if present and align with API title-case values (Draft, Open, Distributed, Closed).

tasks.title: Add unique constraint for submittal_responses upsert
tasks.description: Add a migration creating a unique constraint on (workflow_step_id, responder_id) in submittal_responses to support the existing upsert logic.

tasks.title: Create POST distribute endpoint
tasks.description: Create the distribute route handler that transitions submittal status to Distributed and notifies the distribution list.

tasks.title: Create POST revisions endpoint
tasks.description: Create the revisions route handler to support creating new revisions of an existing submittal.

tasks.title: Fix response status vocabulary to match Procore
tasks.description: Remove Received from the response status enum and add Reviewed - No Exception to align with Procore vocabulary.

tasks.title: Fix BIC advancement to check all group responses
tasks.description: Update ball-in-court advancement logic to verify all required responders in the current step have responded before advancing to the next step.

tasks.title: Resolve 4 always-null table columns via API joins
tasks.description: Add joins in the submittals list API to resolve responsible_contractor, received_from, approvers, and latest_response from related tables.

tasks.title: Replace ball_in_court text Input with user select
tasks.description: Change the ball_in_court form field from a free-text Input to a user select dropdown that stores the UUID.

tasks.title: Wire Package/Spec pickers to form state
tasks.description: Connect picker components to React Hook Form state via setValue or Controller so selections persist through submission.

tasks.title: Add missing form fields
tasks.description: Add submittal_package_id, cost_code_id, location_id, linked_drawings, distribution_list, and attachments to the Zod schema and form UI.

tasks.title: Add attachment upload UI
tasks.description: Add file upload input to the create/edit form and an attachments section to the detail view, wired to a storage upload endpoint.

tasks.title: Add distribution creation UI
tasks.description: Create a distribute dialog accessible from the detail view toolbar with a user/company multi-select for the distribution list.

tasks.title: Expand history trigger to capture field edits
tasks.description: Expand the submittal_history trigger to capture changes to all significant columns, not just status.

tasks.title: Add Reviewer to STEP_TYPES constant
tasks.description: Add Reviewer as a valid workflow step type in the frontend STEP_TYPES constant.

tasks.title: Add Reviewed - No Exception to response status enum
tasks.description: Add the Reviewed - No Exception value to the response status enum to match Procore vocabulary.

tasks.title: Resolve submittal_type_id NOT NULL ambiguity
tasks.description: Either add Zod validation requiring submittal_type_id, or make the column nullable with a default value.

tasks.title: Create DELETE workflow-steps endpoint
tasks.description: Add a DELETE handler to the workflow-steps route to allow removing individual steps from a submittal workflow.

tasks.title: Create PUT reorder workflow-steps endpoint
tasks.description: Add a PUT handler for reordering workflow steps by accepting an ordered array of step IDs.
tasks.resolution: Implemented in remediation loop 2 (API route additions and reorder support).

tasks.title: Create POST submittal packages endpoint
tasks.description: Create a route handler to support creating submittal packages via the API.
tasks.resolution: Implemented in remediation loop 2 (API route additions and reorder support).

tasks.title: Create POST attachments upload endpoint
tasks.description: Create an attachments route handler using Supabase Storage for file uploads on submittals.
tasks.resolution: Implemented in remediation loop 2 (API route additions and reorder support).

tasks.title: Add auto-close on final workflow step completion
tasks.description: Add logic in the response handler to check if all steps are complete and auto-transition submittal status to Closed.

tasks.title: Add Submittal Package option to create dropdown
tasks.description: Add a Submittal Package option to the create/new dropdown menu on the submittals list page.

tasks.title: Add Create & Send submit button
tasks.description: Add a secondary Create & Send button that triggers creation followed by immediate distribution.

tasks.title: Add Emails tab to detail view
tasks.description: Add an Emails tab to the submittal detail view to match Procore's tab structure.

tasks.title: Add 7 missing fields to detail sidebar
tasks.description: Add received_from, responsible_contractor, cost_code, location, linked_drawings, distribution_list, and revision_number to the detail sidebar.

tasks.title: Enable selection and bulk actions in grouped views
tasks.description: Add row selection checkboxes and bulk action toolbars to the grouped display mode for submittals.

tasks.title: Add 10 missing filters to submittals list
tasks.description: Add missing filter definitions (responsible contractor, received from, ball in court, package, cost code, location, etc.) to the table configuration.

tasks.title: Build API endpoints for 4 unused tables
tasks.description: Create API endpoints for submittal_packages, submittal_types, submittal_spec_sections, and submittal_linked_drawings tables.
tasks.resolution: Implemented in remediation loop 2 (API route additions and reorder support).

tasks.title: Create related-items management endpoint
tasks.description: Create a related-items sub-route with GET/POST/DELETE handlers to manage links between submittals and other entities.
tasks.resolution: Implemented in remediation loop 2 (API route additions and reorder support).

tasks.title: Add Redistribute toolbar action
tasks.description: Add a Redistribute button to the detail view toolbar that calls the distribute endpoint with updated parameters.

tasks.title: Add PDF and Excel export options
tasks.description: Add server-side PDF export and client-side Excel export (via xlsx library) alongside the existing CSV export.

tasks.title: Submittals page does not reach stable loaded state in Playwright smoke beforeEach
Submittals page header selector h1:has-text("Submittals") not found in end-to-end verification
tasks.resolution: Patched submittals.spec.ts to current route/UI contract
